name: Track Enterprise Recipient Velocity
description: Tracks recipient fan-in across wallets (no alert)

metadata.note: Tracker rule - increments recipient counter before block rule check

name: Enterprise Lateral Movement Detection
description: Detects when same recipient receives from 3+ internal wallets in 1 hour (coordinated breach)

rule.message: 🚨 Enterprise: Lateral movement detected - recipient received from 3+ wallets in 1h - possible coordinated breach

metadata.tuning_note: Allowlist legitimate shared recipients (e.g., company treasury, exchange hot wallets)
metadata.drift_protocol_reference: This pattern would detect coordinated wallet compromises similar to Drift Protocol attack

name: Enterprise Token Drain Velocity
description: Detects unusual token transfer velocity (10+ transfers of same token in 15 min across all wallets)

rule.message: 🚨 Enterprise: Unusual token transfer velocity - 10+ transfers in 15 min - possible mass compromise

metadata.tuning_note: Adjust threshold based on organization's normal trading volume

name: Track Nonce Advancement
description: Tracks when durable nonces are advanced (no alert)

metadata.note: Tracker rule - sets flowbit with 30-min TTL for nonce staleness detection

name: Enterprise Durable Nonce Staleness
description: Blocks high-value transfers using stale durable nonces (>30 min old or never tracked)

rule.message: 🚨 Enterprise: Stale nonce detected (30+ min old or never tracked) on high-value transfer - DRIFT PROTOCOL ATTACK PATTERN

metadata.tuning_note: Adjust TTL (30 min) and transfer threshold (1 SOL) based on organization's workflow

drift_protocol_exploit.description: Attackers used pre-signed durable nonces with authority change instructions
drift_protocol_exploit.existing_mitigation: drift-exploit-protection.json already blocks core Drift patterns (fingerprint-based, pattern-based, log-based)
drift_protocol_exploit.flowbits_enhancement: This rule adds time-based defense-in-depth by blocking stale nonces (>30 min old) on high-value transfers
